name: Sarvam-105B
archDisplay: 105B MoE transformer (128 experts, ~10.3B active/token), Multi-head Latent Attention
note: India's first sovereign 100B+ open model, trained from scratch under the IndiaAI Mission; Apache-2.0 MoE with Multi-head Latent Attention and 128K context via YaRN, covering 22 Indian languages plus English.
tpsNote: Too large to run on a single RTX 4090 even at Q4 (~64GB needed); no consumer single-GPU llama.cpp benchmark found.

results.notes: Arena Hard v2, from the model card's 'Knowledge & Coding' benchmark table
IFEval, from the model card's 'Knowledge & Coding' benchmark table

verificationNotes: Confirmed real, very recent release — independently corroborated by Bloomberg ('Upstart Sarvam Unveils AI Model Customized for India Market', 2026-02-18), TechCrunch, Business Standard, and BusinessToday, all reporting weights publicly available since 2026-02-18 at the India AI Impact Summit (a later Sarvam blog post dated ~2026-03-06 appears to be a secondary/formal write-up, not the actual release date). Architecture (MoE, 128 experts, Multi-head Latent Attention, 10.3B active, 128K context via YaRN factor 40) and all 8 result rows literally confirmed on https://huggingface.co/sarvamai/sarvam-105b and the official Sarvam blog. Apache 2.0 license confirmed. Minor note: HF safetensors metadata reports actual weight size as '106B params' though the model is uniformly named/marketed as '105B' by Sarvam and all press — paramsB=105 kept per canonical naming. No corrections made to core fields.
